items.title: De-duplication
items.description: Convert a list to a set to remove duplicates in one line: list(set(items)).

items.title: Counting & grouping
items.description: Dicts (and collections.Counter) are the go-to for frequency counts and grouping records.

items.title: Fast lookups
items.description: Sets and dicts give near-constant-time membership tests, ideal for filtering large datasets.
